mapper.select: SELECT ind.code, ind.name, COUNT(DISTINCT sci.stock_code) AS stockCount, SUM(md.margin_balance) AS marginBalance, SUM(md.margin_change) AS marginChange, SUM(md.short_balance) AS shortBalance, SUM(md.short_change) AS shortChange, MAX(sci.snap_date) AS snapDate FROM industry ind LEFT JOIN stock_industry sci ON ind.code = sci.industry_code AND sci.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN margin_daily md ON sci.stock_code = md.stock_code AND sci.snap_date = md.trade_date AND md.is_deleted = 0 AND md.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND md.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) WHERE ind.is_deleted = 0 AND ind.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') GROUP BY ind.code, ind.name ORDER BY ${sortBy} ${sortDir} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ind.id) FROM industry ind LEFT JOIN stock_industry sci ON ind.code = sci.industry_code AND sci.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN margin_daily md ON sci.stock_code = md.stock_code AND sci.snap_date = md.trade_date AND md.is_deleted = 0 AND md.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND md.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) WHERE ind.is_deleted = 0 AND ind.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
